chunks.title: Hezekiah's Accession and Opening the Temple
chunks.reason: Introduces Hezekiah's reign and his initial action of opening the temple doors.

chunks.title: Hezekiah's Exhortation to the Priests and Levites
chunks.reason: Contains Hezekiah's direct address calling for holiness and explaining the need for reform.

chunks.title: Levite Leaders Named
chunks.reason: Lists specific Levites from various clans who responded to the call.

chunks.title: Cleansing of the Temple
chunks.reason: Describes the physical cleansing process and the report to the king.

chunks.title: The Consecration Sacrifices and Worship
chunks.reason: Details the sin offerings, burnt offerings, musical worship, and the assembly's response.

chunks.title: The Great Sacrifice and Celebration
chunks.reason: Describes the additional offerings brought by the people and the joy of the restoration.
